---
title: "Aidan Mistry"
image: images/aidan_profile_photo.jpg
about:
  template: trestles 
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aidan-mistry-56832b2a0/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AMistry176
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: aidanmistry17@gmail.com
